settings.languageInvalidMessage: {{language}} could not be activated because its locale JSON is invalid.
settings.languageLoadFailedMessage: {{language}} could not be activated because its locale file could not be loaded.
login.title: Login
share.placeholder: Your URL will be put here
livePlaylist.description1: Live playlist mode keeps your current queue synced to the server.
livePlaylist.description2: Using live playlist on two devices at the same time might result in some odd behavior
upload.dragDrop: Drag & drop files anywhere on the page
upload.dragDropHint: or use the button below to select files
upload.ytdlDescription: Download youtube videos to your server.
upload.ytdlRequirement: You must have yt-dlp installed for this to work!
upload.ytdlTranscodeWarning: Transcoding needs to be enabled for this feature
metadata.title: Title:
albumArt.embedInFile: Embed album art in audio file
toast.filesExplorerOnly: Files can only be added to the file explorer
toast.youtubeUrlRequired: URL must be a YouTube link
toast.invalidImageFormat: Invalid format. Use JPEG, PNG, or WebP.
error.genericError: An error occurred. Please refresh the page and try again
status.noArtistOrAlbumInfo: No artist or album info available for search
transcode.disabled: Transcoding is disabled on this server
autoDJ.description: Auto DJ randomly generates a playlist. Click the 'DJ' button on the bottom to enable it
autoDJ.uncheckedHint: Unchecked folders will be ignored in all DB queries (including Auto DJ)
jukebox.title: Jukebox Mode
jukebox.description: Control this page remotely from another device
jukebox.serverAudioDescription: Play music through the server's speakers instead of the browser
admin.languages.title: Languages
admin.languages.desc: Control which languages are available in the player language picker. English is always available as fallback.
admin.common.rebootHint: ⚠ Requires a server reboot to apply.
admin.common.rebootHintRedirect: ⚠ Requires a reboot. You will be redirected automatically.
admin.playStats.title: Play Statistics
admin.playStats.subtitle: All listening events recorded on this server.
admin.playStats.deleteRangeDesc: Deletes all song, radio, and podcast events for the selected user that fall within the chosen time window.
admin.playStats.fixMetadataDesc: For files with no embedded tags at all, this derives artist, album, and title from the parent folder name using the pattern "Artist - Release info" and writes them to the Velvet database only.
admin.playStats.fixMetadataNote: These derived values are safe through rescans. Only files whose content changes trigger a full re-parse.
admin.playStats.confirmDeleteMsg: Song, radio, and podcast events between {{from}} and {{to}} will be permanently deleted.
admin.playStats.confirmBackfillTitle: Derive missing artist/album/title from folder names?
admin.playStats.confirmBackfillMsg: Files with no embedded tags will be updated using the pattern "Artist - Release info" in the parent folder name. This cannot be undone without a full rescan.
admin.scanErrors.title: Scan Error Audit
admin.scanErrors.subtitle: Persistent log of every file that failed during a library scan — deduplicated by file & error type so recurring problems show a count, not duplicate rows.
admin.scanErrors.retentionHint: Older entries are pruned at scan start
admin.scanErrors.emptyMsg: Your library scanned cleanly — no file parsing, art extraction, cue sheet or database errors were recorded.
admin.scanErrors.truncationWarning: Showing first {{shown}} of {{total}} errors. Use Clear All to remove old entries, then re-scan to re-detect current problems.
admin.scanErrors.deletedBodyInterrupted: The scan was interrupted by a connection error — the file may be fine. Run another scan. This record will expire automatically after 48 h.
admin.scanErrors.deletedBodyRemoved: This file was removed from the library (most likely deleted from disk). No action needed — this record will expire automatically after 48 h.
admin.scanErrors.unrecoverableBody: No valid audio stream was found. This file cannot be played or repaired — it contains no audio data. Delete it from disk.
admin.scanErrors.fixRescanWaiting: — rescan to confirm, auto-removed after 48 h
admin.scanErrors.fixNoActionNeeded: No fix needed — file has been removed from the library.
admin.scanErrors.fixHintArt: Strips embedded images with ffmpeg — then rescan to update the library
admin.scanErrors.fixHintCue: Marks cue error as dismissed — auto-expires in 48 h
admin.scanErrors.fixHintParse: Rewrites file with ffmpeg (lossless, no re-encode) — then rescan to update the library
admin.scanErrors.fixHintOther: Dismisses this error — auto-expires in 48 h
admin.scanErrors.toastFileUnrecoverableM: No valid audio stream found. This file cannot be played or repaired. Delete it.
admin.scanErrors.confirmClearMsg: This deletes the entire error history. Errors will re-appear on the next scan if the underlying problems persist.
admin.dirAccess.title: Directory Access Test
admin.dirAccess.subtitle: Read / write check for each configured directory
admin.dirAccess.adviceAllGood: All directories are accessible with full read/write permissions. No action needed.
admin.dirAccess.adviceNoAccess: One or more directories cannot be read at all. Verify the path still exists and that the Velvet process has at least read permission.
admin.dirAccess.adviceReadOnlyLinux: One or more directories are read-only. Fix with: sudo chown -R $(whoami) /path/to/dir && chmod -R u+rw /path/to/dir
admin.dirAccess.adviceReadOnlyWindows: One or more directories are read-only. Right-click the folder → Properties → Security → grant the Velvet service account Modify permission.
admin.folders.pathPlaceholder: Click Browse to choose a folder…
admin.folders.aliasHint: A short URL-friendly name used to identify this directory in the API and player. Letters, numbers, hyphens only — no spaces.
admin.folders.optionAutoAccessDesc: Every existing and new user will automatically have this directory in their allowed paths. Uncheck to manage access per-user manually.
admin.folders.optionAudiobooksDesc: Mark this directory as an Audiobooks / Podcasts library. Files will be scanned and displayed separately from your main music collection, allowing you to browse and stream spoken-word content independently.
admin.folders.optionExcludedDesc: Files in this folder will not be scanned into the music library. Any existing indexed entries will be removed on the next scan of the parent folder.
admin.folders.optionRecordingsDesc: Target folder for radio stream recordings. Not scanned into the music library. Can be combined with YouTube Downloads below.
admin.folders.optionYoutubeDesc: Target folder for YouTube audio downloads. Not scanned into the music library. Can be combined with Radio Recordings above.
admin.folders.optionAllowDeleteDesc: When enabled, a Delete option appears in the context menu for files in this folder. A confirmation prompt is always shown before deletion.
admin.folders.structureSummary: Live scanner hierarchy preview. Root folders are scanned directly; child folders are indexed under their nearest parent root.
admin.folders.structureInfoRoot: ROOT: all folders under a root are shown in the file explorer.
admin.folders.structureInfoChild: Child: child folders are shortcuts for easier file explorer access and can be used as filters for Auto-DJ, Albums Only, search, and related features.
admin.folders.structureInfoExclude: Exclude: folders can be excluded from indexing within a root. If they are included through a higher-level parent in the hierarchy, they remain accessible there.
admin.folders.structureImpliedBody: These folders share this parent path, but no folder with this exact root is configured. They will be treated as independent roots unless you add this parent root.
admin.folders.editPathHint: Changing the path requires a server restart to take effect for media serving.
admin.folders.artistsHint: Artists: root folders apply to the whole library. Child folders act as include/exclude sub-sections inside their parent.
admin.folders.toastDeleteEnabled: Users can now delete their own recordings
admin.folders.toastAlbumsOnlyEnabled: Albums Only enabled — Albums view restricted to this folder
admin.folders.toastArtistsEnabled: Artist Library enabled for this folder
admin.folders.toastArtistsDisabled: Artist Library disabled for this folder
admin.folders.toastArtistsRebuild: Artist index is being rebuilt in the background.
admin.folders.toastServerRebooting: Server Rebooting. Please wait 30s for the server to come back online
admin.folders.confirmRemoveMsg: No files will be deleted. Your server will need to reboot.
admin.users.addDesc: Create a new account. The first user must have admin access.
admin.users.noDirectoriesToSelect: No directories — add a music folder first
admin.users.folderSelectHint: Select at least one folder. Hold Ctrl / Cmd to select multiple.
admin.users.grantAdminDesc: Admin users can access this settings panel and manage all users.
admin.users.noUsersYet: No users — authentication is currently disabled. The first user you create must have admin access.
admin.users.toastNoFolderMsg: Please select at least one folder for this user.
admin.settings.themeHint: Sets the theme shown to users who have not yet chosen a personal preference.
admin.settings.toastCertsDeleted: Certs Deleted. You will be redirected shortly
admin.settings.confirmRemoveSslMsg: Your server will need to reboot
admin.settings.confirmNewKeyMsg: All active login sessions will be invalidated. You will need to login after
admin.db.scanSettingsDesc: Automatic library scan frequency and schedule
admin.db.scanIntervalHint: Set to 0 to disable automatic scans.
admin.db.scanStartTimeHint: Optional. Format HH:MM (24h). Leave empty to scan every N hours from boot instead.
admin.db.filesIndexedNoStats: {{count}} files indexed — restart the server to see full statistics.
admin.db.toastReloadArtistLibrary: Reload the Artist Library to see updated groups.
admin.db.toastRebuildTimedOutMsg: The rebuild is still running in the background.
admin.db.confirmCompressMsg: This process will run in the background
admin.db.confirmDeleteNoExpiryTitle: Delete all playlists without expiration dates?
admin.backup.title: Backup
admin.backup.desc: Create a backup of the database and configuration file. Backups are stored in save/backups/. A weekly automatic backup keeps the 4 most recent.
admin.migrate.title: Import & Export
admin.migrate.desc: Export your Velvet configuration and data as a ZIP file, or import from a previous export.
admin.migrate.exportDesc: Download your current configuration, database, and optionally waveform cache and artist images as a ZIP archive.
admin.migrate.artistImagesUnavailable: Not available — artist images (~15 GB) are a regenerable cache and excluded to avoid filling disk space.
admin.migrate.exportBuilding: Preparing export… this may take a moment.
admin.migrate.toastExportStarted: Building export ZIP in the background…
admin.migrate.toastExportReady: Export ready — click Download to save
admin.migrate.importDesc: Upload a previously exported ZIP file to restore your configuration and data.
admin.migrate.keepUsersDesc: If checked, your existing users will be preserved. If unchecked, users from the archive will replace current users.
admin.migrate.successMessage: The archive has been imported. Please restart the server for changes to take effect.
admin.serverAudio.title: Server Audio
admin.serverAudio.desc: Stream audio directly through the server's speakers.
admin.federation.title: Velvet Federation
admin.logs.title: Logging
admin.lock.title: Lock Admin Panel
admin.lock.desc: Disabling the admin panel will prevent anyone from making configuration changes through this interface.
admin.lock.reenableIntro: To re-enable it you will need to:
admin.lastfm.title: Last.fm
admin.listenbrainz.title: ListenBrainz
admin.discogs.title: Discogs Cover Art
admin.lyrics.title: Synced Lyrics
admin.radio.title: Radio Streams
admin.radio.checkboxEnable: Allow users to add and play internet radio stations
admin.radio.maxRecordingUnit: minutes — recordings are auto-stopped after this limit
admin.info.creditMaintainer: Velvet features, functionality and maintenance by AroundMyRoom
admin.info.telemetryDesc: Velvet sends a small anonymous ping once at startup and then every 24 hours. This helps us understand how many instances are running and which versions are in use.
admin.info.telemetryDataTitle: Exactly this data is sent — nothing more:
admin.info.telemetryPrivacy: No IP addresses, usernames, file paths, or any personal data is ever collected. The UUID is stored in save/conf/instance-id and never changes unless you delete it. To opt out permanently, add "telemetry": false to your config file and restart Velvet.
admin.info.legalGpl: Velvet is free software distributed under the
admin.info.legalNoWarranty: This program is distributed WITHOUT ANY WARRANTY; without even the implied warranty of MERCHANTABILITY or FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE.
admin.info.legalSourceRef: The original source code this project was derived from is available at
admin.artists.title: Artist Images
admin.artists.desc: Review missing or wrong artist portraits and fix them with Discogs suggestions or a direct link.
admin.artists.hydrationIdleHint: Background hydration is idle. Click Queue next 500 to start processing missing artist images.
admin.artists.noImageHint: {{count}} artists were already checked and returned no image. Review them in the No image found tab.
admin.artists.selectPrompt: Select an artist from the left to repair image mapping.
admin.artists.previewError: This URL could not be previewed as an image. Check the link before applying it.
admin.artists.previewDesc: The pasted image will be downloaded, resized, and stored for {{artist}}.
admin.artists.discogsDisabledHint: Discogs suggestions are disabled. Enable Discogs and set API key/secret in Admin → Discogs.
admin.artists.discogsNone: No Discogs candidates found for this artist.
admin.artists.toastFailedLoad: Failed to load artists image audit
admin.artists.toastTadbQueued: Queued {{count}} no-image artists for TheAudioDB retry
admin.artists.placeholderDefaultActive: Showing built-in default. Upload your own image to replace it.
admin.artists.placeholderCustomActive: Custom placeholder active. Delete to revert to the built-in default.
admin.artists.placeholderCacheHint: After uploading or deleting, force-refresh your browser (Ctrl+Shift+R / Cmd+Shift+R) to clear the cache.
admin.genreGroups.title: Groups & Genres
admin.genreGroups.desc: Organise genres into top-level groups for the Genres view and Smart Playlists.
admin.genreGroups.hint: Double-click a group name to rename it. Drag a genre chip from the right panel onto a group on the left.
admin.genreGroups.autoDetectedNotice: Auto-detected defaults based on your music library. Edit and Save to store your custom grouping.
admin.genreGroups.searchPlaceholder: e.g. house  ·  deep house  ·  house -acid  ·  house +deep
admin.genreGroups.syntaxHint: · +word = must include   -word = exclude — drag a chip to a group on the left
admin.genreGroups.confirmResetMsg: All custom groups will be removed. The player will fall back to automatic genre classification.
admin.modal.toastPortUpdated: Port Updated. You will be redirected shortly
admin.modal.toastSslUpdated: Updated. Rebooting — you will be redirected to HTTPS shortly.
admin.modal.toastMaxRequestSizeSuccess: Success: Allow the server 30 seconds to reboot
admin.radio.desc1: When enabled, users see a Radio Streams section under Library in the player. Each user manages their own personal list of internet radio channels — channels are not shared between users.
admin.radio.desc2: Only direct HTTP/HTTPS audio stream URLs are supported. M3U/M3U8 playlist URLs are intentionally not accepted. Each channel can have up to 3 fallback stream links.
admin.lyrics.desc1before: When enabled, the visualizer's Lyrics mode fetches time-synced LRC lyrics from
admin.lyrics.desc1after: and displays them in sync with playback. Lyrics are cached locally after the first fetch so repeated plays work offline.
admin.lyrics.desc2: Disable this if the server has no internet access, to avoid timeout delays when the player opens the Lyrics view.
admin.lastfm.desc1: When enabled, users can link their Last.fm account to scrobble every track they play. Velvet ships with built-in API credentials — you can optionally override them with
admin.lastfm.secretHint: The shared secret is stored server-side only and is never sent to clients.
admin.lastfm.apiKeyPlaceholder: Leave blank to use built-in key
admin.lastfm.secretPlaceholder: Leave blank to use built-in secret
admin.listenbrainz.desc1: При включении пользователи могут ввести собственный пользовательский токен ListenBrainz для скробблинга каждого воспроизводимого трека. Пользователи находят поле ввода токена в собственном пункте меню на главной странице. Получите токен на
admin.discogs.desc1: When a song is missing album art — or has art that looks wrong — the Now Playing modal shows a Fix Art button. Clicking it searches the Discogs API and presents up to 8 front-cover proposals to choose from. Selecting one permanently embeds the image into the audio file, so every client sees the correct art. This picker is only visible to admins.
admin.discogs.desc2: API key & secret are optional. Without them, Discogs allows 25 unauthenticated requests per minute — enough for casual use. Authenticated requests rise to 60 per minute.
admin.discogs.secretHint: The key and secret are stored server-side only and are never exposed to non-admin users.
admin.discogs.allowArtUpdateDesc: When enabled, the Fix Art button also appears on songs that already have album art, letting you update it. The old art is removed from the cache and database once no other song references it.
admin.discogs.instanceTagDesc: Optional. Up to 4 letters/digits. Your tag is appended to the User-Agent sent to Discogs.
admin.discogs.itunesDesc: No API key required. Searches the iTunes Search API for album covers.
admin.discogs.deezerDesc: No API key required. Searches the Deezer API for album covers.
admin.serverAudio.how1: Velvet starts mpv in idle mode and communicates via a local Unix socket (JSON IPC).
admin.serverAudio.how2: Your browser becomes a remote control — no app install needed on any device.
admin.serverAudio.how3: On Linux, Velvet uses alsa-utils (amixer/aplay) for sound diagnostics, auto-unmute, and the test tone. Install with: sudo apt install mpv alsa-utils
admin.serverAudio.how4before: Auto-DJ in the remote page queues songs automatically, with optional Last.fm similar-artists. See the
admin.serverAudio.remoteHint: A lightweight browser remote at /server-remote lets you control playback, browse files, and run Auto-DJ from any device.
admin.serverAudio.detectNotFound: ✗ mpv not found at {{path}}. Install mpv or set path above.
admin.serverAudio.confirmEnableMsg: This will start mpv on the server.
admin.serverAudio.confirmDisableMsg: This will stop mpv on the server.
admin.serverAudio.helpStatus: Enable controls whether Server Audio is available and auto-started on Velvet boot.
admin.serverAudio.helpAutostart: When enabled, mpv is started automatically whenever the Velvet service starts.
admin.serverAudio.helpAutoUnmute: Linux only: before starting mpv, Velvet tries to unmute key ALSA mixer channels and set volume to 90%.
admin.serverAudio.helpMpvPath: Set a full binary path if mpv is not available on PATH.
admin.serverAudio.helpButtons: Detect verifies mpv only. Sound check inspects ALSA tools, mixer mute state, and detected sound cards. Apply fix attempts to unmute Master/Speaker/PCM/Headphone and set safe volume.
admin.serverAudio.healthMpvMissing: mpv binary was not found at {{path}}.
admin.serverAudio.healthAmixerMissing: ALSA tools are missing. Install alsa-utils on the server.
admin.serverAudio.healthHint: If audio still does not play, open alsamixer on the server and verify the output device and channel routing.
admin.serverAudio.confirmAutoUnmuteEnabl: Velvet will try to unmute ALSA channels when Server Audio starts.
admin.serverAudio.confirmAutoUnmuteDisab: Velvet will stop modifying ALSA mixer state before starting mpv.
admin.serverAudio.explainDetectMpv: Checks whether the configured mpv binary can be executed and returns its version.
admin.serverAudio.explainStartMpv: Starts mpv now. Use this if Server Audio is enabled but currently not running.
admin.serverAudio.explainStopMpv: Stops mpv now without disabling Server Audio configuration.
admin.serverAudio.explainAudioCheck: Runs Linux sound diagnostics: ALSA tools, muted channels, and detected sound cards.
admin.serverAudio.explainAudioFix: Admin-only repair: attempts unmute + 90% volume on common ALSA channels.
admin.serverAudio.explainOpenRemote: Opens the remote control page in a new tab so you can control server speaker playback.
admin.serverAudio.tipDetectMpv: Check if mpv binary exists and read its version
admin.serverAudio.tipStartMpv: Start the server mpv process now
admin.serverAudio.tipStopMpv: Stop the server mpv process now
admin.serverAudio.tipOpenRemote: Open /server-remote in a new browser tab
admin.serverAudio.explainGuidedTest: Runs an end-to-end test flow (detect, check, fix-if-needed, start) and prints a step report.
admin.serverAudio.tipGuidedTest: Run a full guided audio test and show pass/fail steps
admin.serverAudio.explainTestTone: Plays a 3-second stereo test: 440 Hz on the left speaker, 880 Hz on the right. You should hear both sides clearly.
admin.serverAudio.tipTestTone: Send a 440 Hz test tone through the server speaker via mpv
admin.serverAudio.actionTestToneOk: Test tone sent — you should hear 440 Hz left and 880 Hz right on the server speaker.
admin.serverAudio.actionStartOk: mpv start command was sent successfully.
admin.serverAudio.actionStopOk: mpv stop command was sent successfully.
admin.serverAudio.stepNeedAlsaUtils: ALSA tools not found. Install alsa-utils first.
admin.serverAudio.stepApplyFixWarn: Fix was attempted, but some channels may still need manual alsamixer adjustment.
admin.serverAudio.stepStartMpvFail: mpv is still not running after start command.
admin.serverAudio.stepOpenRemoteHint: Use Open Server Remote and play a track to confirm speaker output.
admin.serverAudio.stepUnexpectedDetail: The guided flow failed before completion.
admin.serverAudio.guidedFinishedFail: Guided sound test stopped with errors.
admin.federation.labelSelectFolders: Select and name folders you want to federate:
admin.federation.tokenHint: Paste your token in the textbox to continue
admin.users.addMusicFirst: Add a music directory before creating users.
admin.users.tooltipDisableCast: Click to revoke MPV cast button access
admin.users.tooltipEnableCast: Click to allow MPV cast button in player
admin.users.noUsersSubsonicDesc: Subsonic-compatible apps (Ultrasonic, DSub, Symfonium…) require a username.
admin.users.noUsersSubsonicUser: Use velvet-user as the username with any password.
admin.users.firstUserMsg: You will now be taken to the login page.
admin.userPassword.subsonicDesc: Used by Subsonic-compatible apps (Ultrasonic, DSub, Symfonium, etc.). Must be stored in plain text for MD5 token auth.
admin.userPassword.toastNothingMsg: Enter a new Velvet password, Subsonic password, or both.
admin.userVpaths.title: Accessible Folders
admin.userVpaths.hint: Hold Ctrl / Cmd to select multiple folders.
admin.userAccess.warning: Warning: removing the last admin account will lock you out of this panel.
admin.folders.editTypeCombinedHint: Check one or both. Both checked = Radio+YouTube combined folder. Excluded = never scanned or indexed.
admin.modal.maxRequestSizeWarning: ⚠ Requires a server reboot to apply.
admin.modal.portWarning: ⚠ Requires a reboot. You will be redirected automatically.
admin.modal.maxScansWarning: ⚠ Values above 1 are experimental and may cause instability.
admin.modal.intervalZeroHint: Set to 0 to disable automatic scans.
admin.modal.zipSizeHint: ZIP downloads exceeding this limit are rejected. Default: 500 MB.
admin.modal.sslWarning: ⚠ Requires a reboot. You will be redirected to HTTPS automatically.
admin.modal.mpvBinDesc: Full path or just 'mpv' if it's on your PATH
admin.modal.algorithmSubtitle: How audio is processed and delivered
admin.modal.serverAddressSubtitle: Only change if you know what you're doing
admin.modal.scanSettingsSubtitle: Automatic library scan frequency and schedule
admin.modal.algoStream: Stream — instant start, may not work on all devices
admin.modal.dirTestSubtitle: Read / write check for each configured directory
admin.genreGroups.dropHintNoDelete: Groups cannot be deleted — move unwanted genres to Other.
player.langPicker.label: Language
player.login.tagline: a music server — evolved with AI slop.
player.sonosRadio.title: Sonos Radio Favourite Channels
player.sonosRadio.noDevice: No Sonos device configured. Please enable Sonos in Admin panel.
player.sonosRadio.error: Failed to load Sonos Radio favorites
player.sonosRadio.playUnsupported: This Sonos item cannot be started via local API on this device.
player.sonosRadio.noContent: No content returned by Sonos for this menu.
player.sonosRadio.noDeviceFound: Sonos is enabled but no device found. Please add a device in Admin → Sonos.
player.mlPlaylist.title: Listening Habits
player.mlPlaylist.subtitle: Personalised playlists based on what you listen to — improves over time.
player.mlPlaylist.noData: Keep listening — your personalised playlist will appear here after a few songs.
player.eq.title: Equalizer
player.modal.recChooseFolder: Choose a Recordings folder to save to. The recording starts immediately.
player.modal.shareDesc: Creates a public link anyone can listen to — no login required.
player.modal.delShareMsg: Anyone with this URL will immediately lose access. This cannot be undone.
player.subsonic.scrobbleDesc: When a Subsonic-compatible app (Symfonium, DSub, Ultrasonic…) finishes a track and sends a scrobble, forward it to your linked services.
player.subsonic.scrobbleLastfmHint: Scrobble to Last.fm when a Subsonic client reports a completed track
player.subsonic.scrobbleLbHint: Submit to ListenBrainz when a Subsonic client reports a completed track
player.apps.title: Mobile Apps
player.apps.desc: Listen to your music on the go with the official Velvet apps.
player.apps.qrTitle: Add this server to the app
player.apps.qrDesc: Use the QR code tool to quickly connect a mobile device to this server.
player.playHistory.mostPlayedDesc: Reset all play-count statistics to zero. The Most Played list will be empty until songs are played again.
player.playHistory.playCountsHint: Clears the play-count number on every song
player.playHistory.recentlyPlayedDesc: Reset all last-played timestamps. The Recently Played list will be empty until songs are played again.
player.playHistory.lastPlayedHint: Clears the date each song was last played
player.playHistory.confirmMostPlayedMsg: All play counts will be set to zero. This cannot be undone.
player.playHistory.confirmRecentlyPlayed: All last-played timestamps will be cleared. This cannot be undone.
player.history.noHistory: No play history yet — start listening and your songs will show up here.
player.wrapped.factNewDiscoveries: New discoveries: {{count}} songs heard for the first time
player.wrapped.factsEmpty: Play more music to unlock fun facts
player.wrapped.noListeningData: No listening data for this period yet.
player.wrapped.playAndReturn: Start playing music and come back!
player.toast.zipTooLarge: ZIP too large — server limit is {{maxMb}} MB (increase in Admin → DB Settings)
player.toast.tagsSaved: Tags saved — restarting from the beginning
player.toast.copyFailed: Copy failed — select the URL manually
player.toast.coverSaved: Cover saved — cover.jpg written to album folder
player.toast.lastfmEnterCreds: Enter your Last.fm username and password
player.toast.autoResumeOff: Auto-resume: Off — music will pause on reload
player.toast.parseErrorReported: ⚠ Skipping {{name}} — file reported to Scan Error Workshop
player.toast.djNoSong: Auto-DJ: could not load next song — check connection
player.toast.djNoBpmMatch: Auto-DJ: no songs found in BPM range — play a song manually to reset the anchor
player.toast.djMusicOnly: Auto-DJ only works with music — stop radio, podcasts or audiobooks first
player.toast.djMinSourcesRequired: At least one source must be active
player.toast.visualizerLoading: Visualizer loading… try again in a moment
player.toast.playFirstForAudio: Play a song first to initialise audio
player.ytdl.disabledHint: YouTube downloading is not enabled for your account. Ask your server admin to enable it.
player.ytdl.sectionDesc: Download audio from YouTube. Files are saved to your YouTube downloads folder and can be played immediately.
player.ytdl.formatHint: Opus = native stream · MP3 = converted via ffmpeg
player.ytdl.downloadingStatus: Downloading — this may take a moment…
player.ytdl.errorTimeout: Download timed out — check the server logs
player.toast.radioSearchEmptyFields: Enter at least a name, country or genre to search.
player.podcast.namePlaceholder: Custom name (optional — uses feed title by default)
player.podcast.emptyFeeds: No subscriptions yet — add an RSS feed URL above to get started
player.podcast.emptyEpisodes: No episodes found in this feed.
player.radio.emptyStations: No stations yet — click Add Channel to get started
player.radio.queueNotice: Playing a radio stream clears the play queue
player.radio.searchCountryHint: Name or code, e.g. NL, Netherlands
player.radio.searchNoResults: No stations found — try a different search.
player.radio.imageUrlHint: Direct image link shown as album art
player.search.overflow: Showing 50 of {{total}} — refine your search to see more
player.search.noStarred: No starred songs yet. Rate songs with ★
player.recent.gridHint: Папки с недавно добавленными треками — значок показывает количество новых · клик загружает всю папку · новые треки выделены
player.home.emptyHint: Start listening to see your recently played songs here.
player.fe.deleteBody: “{{name}}” will be permanently deleted from the server. This cannot be undone.
player.shortcuts.title: Keyboard shortcuts
player.ctrl.schedRecording: Scheduled recording in progress — click to view
player.ctrl.radioBadge: Found in your library — click to search
player.ctrl.vuSwitch: Click to switch: spectrum / VU meters / PPM / art-pulse
player.ctrl.albPlayHint: Вы в режиме Альбома: выбор трека добавляет весь альбом и сразу воспроизводит выбранный трек.
player.ctrl.albPlayHintDisc: Clicking a track plays that disc from that track — use + on a disc tab to append it to the queue.
player.autodj.heroDesc: Automatically plays random songs from your library so you never run out of music. Adjust the settings below to tune your experience.
player.autodj.statusOn: Auto-DJ is ON — random songs will play continuously
player.autodj.ratingHint: Only play songs with this rating or higher
player.autodj.similarHint: Use Last.fm to bias Auto-DJ towards artists similar to what’s playing
player.autodj.similarHintNoKey: (requires Last.fm API key — configure in Admin → Last.fm)
player.autodj.crossfadeHint: Smoothly blend between tracks · 0 = disabled · max 12 s
player.autodj.diceHint: Throw a tumbling die each time Auto-DJ crossfades to a new track
player.autodj.filterHint: Skip songs whose title, artist, album or filename contains any of these words
player.autodj.genreFilterHint: Restrict Auto-DJ to specific genres (whitelist) or skip genres you dislike (blacklist)
player.autodj.infoNoSimilar: Last.fm has no similar artists for {{artist}} — playing random
player.autodj.infoLookupFailed: Last.fm lookup failed for {{artist}} — playing random
player.autodj.infoNoLibrarySongs: No songs found in your library for Last.fm’s suggestions — playing random
player.autodj.infoBpmFallback: No similar artists match BPM — picked a random song from your library
player.npArt.wavNote: WAV files can’t store embedded art — art will be saved to the database only. It is lost on a DB reset or album-art cache delete.
player.npArt.noSourcesEnabled: No art sources enabled (enable Discogs/Deezer/iTunes in admin)
player.npArt.viaDiscogsAlbum: via Discogs — click a cover to save as cover.jpg
player.npArt.viaDeezerAlbum: via Deezer — click a cover to save as cover.jpg
player.npArt.viaItunesAlbum: via iTunes — click a cover to save as cover.jpg
player.npArt.discogsNotEnabled: Discogs not enabled — configure in admin
player.npArt.noArtistAlbum: No artist or album info available for search
player.npArt.noWriteAccess: Velvet does not have write access to this folder
player.npArt.rateLimited: Rate limited — too many requests in a short time. Please wait a minute and try again.
player.npArt.embedRestartNotice: When embedding new album art, playback restarts because the file size changes.
admin.acoustid.title: AcoustID Fingerprinting
admin.acoustid.desc1: Identify songs in your library by their audio fingerprint using the AcoustID service. Each song is processed locally with fpcalc, then matched against the AcoustID database to retrieve an AcoustID and a MusicBrainz recording ID.
admin.acoustid.secretHint: Your application API key is stored on the server only and is never sent to the client. Register a free key at acoustid.org/new-application.
admin.acoustid.warnNoKey: No API key configured — fingerprinting is disabled until a valid key is entered.
admin.acoustid.warnNoFpcalc: fpcalc (Chromaprint) is not installed or could not be downloaded. On ARM64 Linux: apt install libchromaprint-tools (or apk add chromaprint). AcoustID fingerprinting is unavailable until fpcalc is available.
admin.acoustid.statusWaitingScan: Running — waiting for library scan to finish
admin.acoustid.rateStalled: No new songs processed yet — worker may be starting up
admin.acoustid.rateNote: Обрабатывает ~2 песни в секунду. 10 000 песен ≈ 83 минуты. В зависимости от размера библиотеки это может занять часы и даже дни. Просто оставьте запущенным и перезапустите при бездействии.
admin.tagworkshop.title: Tag Workshop
admin.tagworkshop.desc: Compare your file tags against MusicBrainz data and write corrected metadata to your audio files.
admin.tagworkshop.infoWriteFiles: Tags will be written into the files and directly applied to the database.
admin.tagworkshop.infoNoRecentlyAdded: Accepted songs will not appear as 'Recently Added' — only new scans produce that.
admin.tagworkshop.enrichHint: Looks up your fingerprinted songs in MusicBrainz and downloads album, artist, year and track number. Nothing is written to your files yet — this only prepares data for review.
admin.tagworkshop.prereqNoAcoustid: No AcoustID fingerprints found. Tag Workshop needs songs fingerprinted first.
admin.tagworkshop.prereqNoAcoustidHint: Go to Tools → AcoustID, enter your API key and run the fingerprinter. Once songs are matched, come back here to download MusicBrainz metadata.
admin.tagworkshop.prereqNoMatches: AcoustID processed {{attempted}} song(s) but found no matches. Tag Workshop requires fingerprint matches to look up MusicBrainz data.
admin.tagworkshop.prereqAllDone: All {{total}} matched song(s) have already been looked up in MusicBrainz — nothing left to download.
admin.tagworkshop.enrichExplainLong: Songs must first be fingerprinted by AcoustID (see the AcoustID panel). The worker rate-limits to ~1 song/second to stay within MusicBrainz API policy. Progress is saved — you can stop and resume at any time.
admin.tagworkshop.enrichErrorUnknown: No error details recorded — click "Retry all" to re-process with full diagnostics
admin.tagworkshop.enrichRetryHint: Reset all failed files back to the queue so they are tried again on the next worker run
admin.tagworkshop.errMbUnavailable: MusicBrainz was temporarily unavailable — click ‘Retry all’ to try again
admin.tagworkshop.errMbRateLimit: Too many requests sent to MusicBrainz (rate limited) — click ‘Retry all’ to try again
admin.tagworkshop.errMbTimeout: MusicBrainz request timed out — click ‘Retry all’ to try again
admin.tagworkshop.errMbHttp: MusicBrainz error (HTTP {{code}}) — click ‘Retry all’ to try again
admin.tagworkshop.reviewExplain: Each album below has differences between the tags currently in your files and what MusicBrainz reports. Click 'Compare & apply tags' to see exactly which fields will change, then accept or leave unchanged.
admin.tagworkshop.coverageUnidentifiedHi: These tracks could not be matched to MusicBrainz by fingerprint or text search — they will not appear in the review queue.
admin.tagworkshop.filterHint_all: Show all albums that have MusicBrainz suggestions waiting for your review.
admin.tagworkshop.filterHint_missing: Only show albums where one or more tracks are missing title, artist or album tags entirely.
admin.tagworkshop.filterHint_year: Only show albums where the release year in your files differs from what MusicBrainz reports.
admin.tagworkshop.filterHint_artist: Only show albums where the artist name in your files differs from the MusicBrainz suggestion (useful to fix capitalisation and spelling).
admin.tagworkshop.filterHint_junk: Only show albums where at least one file has a purely numeric artist tag — years like 1989 or track numbers like 01. Accept the MusicBrainz suggestion to fix them.
admin.tagworkshop.sortHint_broken: Show albums with the most tag mismatches first — the ones that need the most attention.
admin.tagworkshop.sortHint_tracks: Show the largest albums (most tracks) first.
admin.tagworkshop.sortHint_alpha: Sort alphabetically by artist name, then album title.
admin.tagworkshop.btnBulkCasingHint: Automatically apply tags for all albums where the only difference is letter casing (e.g. 'the beatles' → 'The Beatles'). No manual review needed.
admin.tagworkshop.btnBulkCasingConfirmHi: This will write tag changes to all casing-only albums. Click once more to proceed.
admin.tagworkshop.shelveHint: Hides this album — move it to the Shelved tab so it doesn't clutter the review list. You can always bring it back.
admin.tagworkshop.shelvedExplain: Albums you chose to leave unchanged for now. Click 'Move back to review' to reconsider them.
admin.tagworkshop.acceptWarning: Clicking 'Write tags to files' will overwrite metadata in {{count}} audio file(s) on disk. The change is permanent — make sure you are happy with the values below before accepting.
admin.tagworkshop.writeErrorsTitle: Some files could not be written:
admin.tagworkshop.cellEditHint: Click any field in this row to edit the suggested value before writing to disk.
admin.tagworkshop.skipNote: Hides this album from the review list without modifying any files.
admin.tagworkshop.legend: Faded row = current tags in your file. Bold row = MusicBrainz suggestion. Green = matches (no change on accept), orange = differs (will be updated on accept).
admin.tagworkshop.toastAcceptedWithSkipp: Tags written to {{written}} file(s) — {{skipped}} already matched, not touched
admin.tagworkshop.toastWritePartial: Written: {{written}} file(s) — {{failed}} file(s) could not be written (see errors above)
admin.tagworkshop.allClean: All enriched tracks have been reviewed — nothing needs attention.
admin.tagworkshop.selectAllHint: Select all albums on this page for batch processing
admin.tagworkshop.selectHint: Select this album for batch processing
admin.tagworkshop.tsTitle: Step 1b — Text Search Fallback (for unrecognised files)
admin.tagworkshop.tsHint: Uses your existing title and artist tags to search MusicBrainz for songs the AcoustID fingerprinter could not identify — typically rare releases, DJ edits, live recordings, and bootlegs. Every match is automatically passed to Step 1 above: the enrichment worker fetches the full album, year, and track details before the file appears in your review queue. Files with no match are marked 'Not found' and skipped. You always have the final say — nothing is written to disk until you approve it in Step 2.
admin.tagworkshop.tsRetryHint: Reset all 'not found' rows so they are retried on the next run
admin.tagworkshop.badgeTextMatchHint: This album contains tracks matched via MusicBrainz text search — less reliable than AcoustID fingerprinting. Review carefully.
player.output.sonosLost: Sonos device offline — switched to browser audio
player.output.statusWarmingUp: Warming up — device found, renderer starting
player.toast.castFailed: Cast failed — check server audio settings
admin.dlna.title: DLNA / UPnP Media Server
admin.dlna.desc: Advertise your music library on the local network so smart TVs, AV receivers, and other UPnP / DLNA devices can browse and play it directly.
admin.dlna.helpPort: Port the DLNA HTTP server listens on. Default: 10293. Changing requires a toggle off/on.
admin.dlna.helpName: Friendly name shown on DLNA devices (e.g. your TV's source list).
admin.dlna.helpStatus: When running, devices on your LAN discover the server automatically via SSDP multicast.
admin.dlna.warningBody: The DLNA port serves all music without authentication. Never expose it to the internet or untrusted networks. Firewall or block port 10293 (or your custom port) from external access.
player.discordWebhook.title: Discord Notifications
player.discordWebhook.desc: Post a message to your Discord server every time you start listening to a track. The admin must configure the webhook URL first.
player.discordWebhook.notEnabled: Discord webhook is not enabled on this server. Ask your admin to configure it.
player.discordWebhook.enableHint: Post a Discord message when you scrobble a track
player.discordWebhook.nickHint: Name shown in Discord messages. Leave blank for a generated nickname.
admin.discordWebhook.title: Discord Webhook
admin.discordWebhook.desc: When enabled, users can opt in to receive a Discord notification every time they scrobble a track. Enter the Discord webhook URL for the target channel.
admin.discordWebhook.checkboxEnable: Enable Discord webhook notifications for users
admin.discordWebhook.urlHint: Only discord.com webhook URLs are accepted. Create one in your Discord server settings under Integrations → Webhooks.
admin.discordWebhook.toastFailed: Failed to save Discord webhook settings
player.webhooks.title: Webhooks
player.webhooks.desc: Receive a notification on external services every time you scrobble a track. The admin must configure the webhook URLs first.
player.webhooks.notEnabled: No webhooks are configured on this server. Ask your admin to set them up.
player.webhooks.enableHint: Send a notification when you scrobble a track
player.webhooks.nickHint: Name included in the webhook payload. Leave blank to use your username.
admin.customWebhooks.title: Custom Webhooks
admin.customWebhooks.desc: Configure up to 2 generic webhooks. When a webhook is enabled, users can opt in to send a scrobble notification to the configured URL every time they listen to a track.
admin.customWebhooks.urlHint: Any https:// URL is accepted. The payload is JSON: { event, artist, album, track, username, timestamp }.
player.pnow.noSongs: No songs found in your library
player.tw.title: Tag Workshop
player.tw.btnOpenTitle: Open Tag Workshop for this folder
player.tw.emptyFolder: No audio files in this folder
player.tw.bulkHint: Fill in the fields you want to apply to all selected files. Leave a field blank to keep existing values.
player.tw.toastNothingToApply: Fill in at least one field to apply
player.tw.manualSection: Manual Edit ({{n}} files without MusicBrainz data)
player.tw.enrichNote: Queues files for background enrichment — reload this folder when done
player.tw.enrichQueued: Queued — come back after enrichment runs
player.tw.scanQueued: Fingerprinting queued — reload this folder when done
admin.rg.title: Normalisation Workshop
admin.rg.desc: Measures the loudness of your entire library using EBU R128 / ReplayGain 2.0. Results are stored in the database and used by the player for gapless volume normalisation.
admin.rg.toolRsgain: rsgain (primary tool) — accurate EBU R128 measurement
admin.rg.toolFfmpeg: ffmpeg fallback — rsgain not available, using built-in ebur128 filter
admin.rg.shelveHint: Shelved files remain in your library but are skipped by the normalisation worker. Unshelve them later to retry.
admin.rg.confirmResetAll: This will clear all measurements and re-queue your entire library. Are you sure?
admin.rg.msgPurged: Removed {{count}} missing files from the library
admin.rg.msgResetAndPurged: Retrying {{reset}} files, removed {{purged}} missing from library
admin.rg.confirmUndoReset: Restore all {{count}} measurements from before the last reset?
admin.rg.undoBanner: Last reset {{ago}} — {{count}} files can be restored
admin.sonos.title: Sonos Integration
admin.sonos.desc: Discover Sonos speakers on your local network and cast music to them.
admin.sonos.probeDesc: Enter a Sonos IP address to verify it is reachable and identify the device.
admin.sonos.discoverDesc: Scan your network for all Sonos rooms. Optionally enter a seed IP (any known Sonos device) for cross-VLAN setups where SSDP multicast does not reach.
admin.sonos.noRooms: No rooms found yet. Click Scan Now.
admin.sonos.noRoomsFound: Scan complete — no Sonos devices found on this network.
admin.sonos.testDesc: Pick a random song from the library and play it on a Sonos device to verify the connection end-to-end.
admin.sonos.helpSleep: Use the speaker's built-in sleep timer. When on, selecting this Sonos in the player wakes it automatically, and pausing for the time below puts it back to sleep.
admin.sonos.helpPauseMins: How long playback may stay paused before the speaker is sent to sleep.
admin.sonos.sleepTestDesc: Verify the speaker accepts sleep/wake before using it in the player. Sleep now starts a countdown; Wake cancels it and resumes playback.
admin.sonos.sleepTestHint: Sonos sleep is an auto-stop countdown, not a standby — start a test track, then Sleep now, and the speaker stops when the countdown ends. Wake cancels it and resumes playback. Note: the speaker fades the volume down over the countdown — this is native Sonos behavior controlled by the speaker, not Velvet, so use a short countdown (5s or less) for a near-instant stop.
admin.sonos.sleepNote30min: With Battery Saver enabled on the device, the speaker powers OFF after 30 minutes of inactivity — once off it is unreachable on the network and we lose all access. Disable Battery Saver in the Sonos app (Settings → System → device → Battery) so it enters a reachable low-power sleep instead.
admin.sonos.sleepNoteLed: Sleep mode is essentially a paused / zero-volume state with the LED off — the device stays reachable. Because the LED state is readable, an LED that is off means either it was turned off intentionally or the device is in sleep mode.
admin.sonos.helpEnabled: When disabled, Sonos output is hidden from the player output picker.
admin.sonos.helpTranscode: Automatically convert incompatible audio to MP3 when casting to Sonos. Covers Opus files (YouTube downloads, recordings), WAV files, and hi-res audio (88 / 96 / 176 / 192 kHz — most Sonos hardware caps at 48 kHz). Uses the built-in ffmpeg — no separate Transcode setup required.
admin.genreEnricher.title: Last.fm Genre Enrichment
admin.genreEnricher.desc: Fetches genre tags from Last.fm's artist.getTopTags API and stores them in the database. Original file tags are never modified.
admin.genreEnricher.btnSelectJunkHint: Selects all rows on this page whose artist tag is a pure number (years like 1989, track numbers like 01). Sets them to 'keep' so Apply selected will mark them as reviewed without changing their genre.
admin.genreEnricher.msgNoJunk: No junk artist names on this page
admin.genreEnricher.btnApplyAllEmptyHint: One-time utility: applies all already-found genres to artists still missing a genre in the database (e.g. from a run before auto-apply was enabled)
admin.genreEnricher.statsNotFoundTitle: Artists where Last.fm, MusicBrainz and Discogs all returned nothing
admin.genreEnricher.statsRemainingTitle: Unique artists not yet fully processed by all 3 sources
admin.genreEnricher.compareDesc: Shows artists that have been enriched but do not yet have a genre in the database. Apply a genre to move them out of this list. Switch to "All enriched" to see artists where a genre is already set.
admin.genreEnricher.filterEmptyTitle: Show only artists with a suggestion but no genre tag yet — add what's missing without touching existing genres
admin.genreEnricher.noResults: No results — run the enricher first or change the filter.
admin.genreEnricher.colApplyAsHint: Choose which source genre to write to the library when you click Apply selected
admin.genreEnricher.applyPickHint: Choose which source to apply for this artist, then tick the checkbox and click Apply selected
admin.genreEnricher.stateOk: {{source}} found a genre — click to select this source
admin.genreEnricher.stateError: {{source}} returned an error — use Reset errors to retry
admin.genreEnricher.stateQueued: {{source}} has not scanned this artist yet
admin.bpmAnalysis.title: BPM & Key Analysis
admin.bpmAnalysis.desc: Collects BPM and musical key for your library to enable BPM-continuity and harmonic mixing in Auto-DJ.
admin.bpmAnalysis.abDesc: Queries AcousticBrainz for your MBID-matched files at 1 req/s. Zero CPU — runs in the background.
admin.bpmAnalysis.abPrereqNoMbids: No MBID-matched files found. Run AcoustID fingerprinting first.
admin.bpmAnalysis.abPrereqAllDone: All {{total}} eligible files have already been looked up.
admin.bpmAnalysis.btnResetNotFoundTitle: Re-queue files where AcousticBrainz returned 'not found' — useful if AB has since added data for these MBIDs
admin.bpmAnalysis.essentiaDesc: Analyses remaining files locally using Essentia (first 30 s each). CPU-intensive — stop and resume any time.
admin.bpmAnalysis.skippedNote: Skipped files are not errors. Songs longer than 20 minutes are intentionally skipped — they are likely DJ mixes or live recordings with a variable BPM that cannot be accurately measured. Songs from very high-bitrate sources (96 kHz / 24-bit) that are just over the limit may be re-queued and retried at a lower sample rate automatically.
admin.bpmAnalysis.resetAllConfirm: This will clear all BPM and key data from your entire library. Are you sure?
admin.bpmAnalysis.msgResetAll: Reset {{count}} files — all BPM data cleared
admin.bpmAnalysis.msgQueuedScan: Scan is in progress — {{feature}} start has been queued
admin.bpmAnalysis.genreCorrectDesc: Corrects doubled/halved Essentia BPM values using the genre tag. Only affects essentia-sourced rows. Always run a dry-run preview first.
admin.bpmAnalysis.genreCorrectUndoConfir: Restore original Essentia BPM values for all genre-corrected rows?
admin.bpmAnalysis.genreCorrectUndone: Restored {{count}} rows to original Essentia values
player.autodj.camelotLegendRule: Mixes with: same number (nA⇔nB) + one step adjacent (±1)
admin.smartPlaylist.title: Smart Playlist ML
admin.smartPlaylist.subtitle: Learns your listening habits by time of day and generates personalised playlists for each slot. Profiles update automatically after each play.
admin.smartPlaylist.betaNotice: Beta feature — set BETA_SMART_PLAYLIST = true in src/beta-flags.js to enable the user-facing endpoints.
admin.smartPlaylist.resetConfirm: Clear all listening profiles for this user? This cannot be undone.
admin.smartPlaylist.noData: No play history yet — start listening to build your profiles
admin.smartPlaylist.playsHint: Plays already processed by the EMA learning algorithm
admin.smartPlaylist.totalEventsHint: All plays recorded in this time slot (live counter)
admin.smartPlaylist.playsNote: Learned = plays processed by the algorithm · Total plays = live counter from all recorded plays
admin.genreEnricher.btnApplyAllConsensus: Apply the agreed genre for every artist where Last.fm, MusicBrainz and Discogs all return the same value — click twice to confirm
admin.genreEnricher.btnApplyAllMajorityH: Apply genre for every artist where 2 of 3 sources agree and the third has no data yet — click twice to confirm
admin.genreEnricher.consensusAgreeHint: All 3 sources agree on this genre — click Apply to set it instantly
admin.genreEnricher.consensusMajorityHin: 2 of 3 sources agree on this genre — the third has no data yet
admin.genreEnricher.consensusEmptyHint: All 3 sources found no genre — click Done to mark as reviewed
admin.genreEnricher.currentGenreHint: Введите, чтобы перезаписать текущий жанр. Сохраняется при Enter/потере фокуса. Хранится в нижнем регистре.
admin.genreEnricher.genreFilterTitle: Show only artists whose current genre tag exactly matches this value — e.g. type 'other' to find and fix placeholder genres
admin.dupWorkshop.title: Duplicate Workshop
admin.dupWorkshop.desc: Find and remove duplicate songs and album folders in your library.
admin.dupWorkshop.idle: Not scanned yet. Click Scan Library to start.
admin.dupWorkshop.confirmMsg: Permanently delete {{n}} file(s)? This cannot be undone.
admin.dupWorkshop.deleteWarning: Deletion is enabled. Files are permanently removed from disk and the database.
player.transcode.title: Transcoding
player.transcode.notEnabled: Transcoding is not enabled on this server. Ask your server admin to enable it in the config.
player.transcode.desc: Stream audio converted on-the-fly to reduce bandwidth. Server default:
player.jukebox.connectHint: Control this player from another device on the same network. Click Connect to generate a shareable remote-control link.
player.jukebox.activeHint: Scan the QR code or share the link to control this player from another device.
admin.modal.portSubtitle: Change the port Velvet listens on
admin.modal.bootScanDelaySubtitle: Seconds to wait before first scan after startup
admin.modal.maxZipSizeSubtitle: Maximum total size of a ZIP download (MB)
admin.modal.sslSubtitle: Enable HTTPS by providing certificate files
admin.modal.federationHoldCtrl: Hold Ctrl / Cmd to select multiple folders.
admin.modal.dirTestAdviceAllGoodText: All directories are accessible with full read/write permissions. No action needed.
admin.modal.dirTestAdviceNoAccess: One or more directories cannot be read at all. Verify the path still exists and that the Velvet process has at least read permission on that location.
admin.modal.dirTestAdviceReadOnlyWin: One or more directories are read-only. Velvet can stream music but cannot embed cover art or write tags. Right-click the folder → Properties → Security → grant the Velvet service account Modify permission.
admin.modal.dirTestAdviceReadOnlyLinux: One or more directories are read-only. Velvet can stream music but cannot embed cover art or write tags. Fix with: sudo chown -R $(whoami) /path/to/dir && chmod -R u+rw /path/to/dir
admin.modal.maxConcurrentScansHint: ⚠ Values above 1 are experimental and may cause instability.
admin.modal.addressHint: ⚠ Requires a reboot. Default 0.0.0.0 binds to all interfaces.
player.sonosRadio.subtitle: Sonos Radio Favourite Channels
player.sonosRadio.info: Sonos Radio favourites can be added in the Sonos app and then you can play them from Velvet to your Sonos device.
player.sonosRadio.warning: It will stop any playing audio from the queue until you restart it.
admin.art.title: Album-Art Workshop
admin.art.desc: Finds albums with no cover, fetches suggestions from Discogs, Deezer and iTunes, and writes cover.jpg only when you approve a choice.
admin.art.libraryScanRunning: Library scan in progress — the pass will start when it finishes
admin.art.empty: Nothing here. Run "Find missing covers" to look for albums without art.
admin.art.clickToApply: Click a thumbnail to write it as cover.jpg
admin.art.msgAlreadyRunning: A cover search is already running
admin.art.msgNoneFound: No covers found for this album
admin.art.shelveConfirm: All albums under this folder will be hidden from the workshop until you unshelve it.
admin.art.shelvedDesc: Folders hidden from the workshop because they will never have cover art. Unshelve to bring their albums back.
admin.art.shelvedEmpty: No folders shelved yet. Use "Shelve folder" on an album to hide its whole folder.
